features.name: Dark/Light Theme
features.description: Toggle between themes using the moon/sun button (top-right). Your preference is saved automatically.

features.name: Live Epoch Clock
features.description: Real-time epoch timestamp with IST, EST, UTC, SAST timezone displays. Click to copy.

sections.title: 🔧 Query Formatter
sections.description: Text processing and epoch conversion tools:

features.name: Data Manipulation
features.description: Add/remove commas, single/double quotes. DelCom has Smart mode (preserves number formatting) and Complete mode.

features.name: Text Analysis
features.description: Count characters (with/without spaces) and words instantly.

features.name: Duplicate Removal
features.description: Click 'Unique' to remove duplicate entries from your list.

features.name: Epoch Converter
features.description: Convert epoch to date with timezone support. Shows day differences when dates vary across timezones (e.g., 'EST/UTC 1 day behind IST').

features.name: Epoch Calculator
features.description: Add or subtract minutes from epoch timestamps.

features.name: Human Date to Epoch
features.description: Enter any date/time and convert to epoch with timezone selection.

features.name: Encoding Tools
features.description: Hex↔Text, Binary, Base64 encode/decode

features.name: Text Utilities
features.description: Case converter (UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, camelCase, snake_case), text reversal, regex escaping

features.name: Security Tools
features.description: JWT decoder, API key generator, PassCraft (customizable password generator with strength indicator)

features.name: Color Converter
features.description: HEX↔RGB↔HSL with visual preview. Recognizes 500+ named colors.

features.name: Markdown Pipeline
features.description: Natural Language → Markdown → HTML with live preview

features.name: Date→Epoch
features.description: Bulk date generation with custom intervals and epoch conversion

features.name: ID Calculator
features.description: Generate sequential database IDs with custom increments

features.name: Duplicate Analyzer
features.description: Find duplicates with counts, export as TAB/CSV/Plain text

features.name: CSV/TSV Processor
features.description: Parse, sort, filter and export to CSV/TSV/JSON/SQL formats

features.name: Image Processor
features.description: Compress, resize, convert images (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Shows before/after size comparison.

features.name: XML Validator
features.description: Validates XML with precise error location (line/column)

features.name: XML to Block
features.description: Convert standard XML to block format for readability

features.name: JSON to XML
features.description: Transform JSON structures to properly formatted XML

features.name: Query to JSON
features.description: Convert URL query strings to formatted JSON

features.name: URL Encode/Decode
features.description: Handle URL encoding for web development

features.name: JSON Validator
features.description: Validate and format JSON with error highlighting

features.name: XML to JSON
features.description: Convert XML documents to JSON format

features.name: Side-by-Side View
features.description: Visual comparison with color-coded additions (green) and deletions (red)

features.name: Statistics
features.description: Shows count of additions, deletions, and modifications

features.name: Unified Diff
features.description: Standard diff format for detailed change tracking

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Upload .txt, .md, .log, .json, .xml, .csv files directly

features.name: Auto-Detection
features.description: Automatically detects SQL, JSON, XML, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, Python, Java, C/C++, PHP

features.name: Beautify
features.description: Format and indent code for better readability

features.name: Minify
features.description: Compress code by removing whitespace

features.name: Format Converter
features.description: Convert descriptive test cases to pipe-separated format

features.name: Test Case Builder
features.description: Create structured test cases with HTML preview

features.name: Excel Export
features.description: Download formatted test case tables as Excel files

features.name: Location Lookup
features.description: Convert addresses to coordinates with type and country info

features.name: GeoJSON Converter
features.description: Transform coordinates to GeoJSON for mapping applications

features.name: Map Links
features.description: Direct OpenStreetMap links for visual verification

features.name: Escape
features.description: Close any open modal dialog

features.name: Click Outside
features.description: Click the dark backdrop to close modals

sections.title: 💡 Pro Tips
sections.description: Get more out of the tools:

features.name: Live Processing
features.description: Many tools process as you type - no button click needed

features.name: Copy Buttons
features.description: 📋 icons copy output to clipboard instantly

features.name: Privacy
features.description: All processing happens locally in your browser - no data sent to servers

features.name: No Registration
features.description: All tools work instantly without login

features.name: Mobile Ready
features.description: Fully responsive on desktop, tablet, and mobile
